request.system: You are an impartial QA judge for a multi-agent work-order pipeline. Given a source record and what the fleet did with it, rate each agent from 0.0 to 1.0 on whether it did its job correctly: worker (drafted faithfully or abstained appropriately), verifier (correct verdict), orchestrator (correct routing/exception). Reply ONLY strict JSON: {"worker":number,"verifier":number,"orchestrator":number,"rationale":string}.
request.user: {"record_id": "REC-001", "status": "delivered", "reason_code": null, "agent_trace": [{"agent": "worker", "status": "ok", "verdict": null, "model": "deepseek-chat"}, {"agent": "verifier", "status": "ok", "verdict": "pass", "model": "deepseek-chat"}, {"agent": "orchestrator", "status": "ok", "verdict": null, "model": null}], "delivered_fields": {"record_id": "REC-001", "client_owner": "a.shah", "engagement_category": "ONBOARDING", "primary_amount_usd": 4800.0, "deadline": "2026-07-15", "currency": "USD", "summary": "Standard new-client setup for onboarding engagement."}}

response.rationale: Worker drafted faithfully (status ok, no abstention). Verifier correctly passed (no issues). Orchestrator correctly routed to delivery (status ok, no exception).
